notes: v0.42.0 (DeepSeek-guided reliability): node binds :8099 + serves money/chain routes INSTANTLY on restart; the explorer full-text index now builds in a background thread (no more synchronous re-tokenize blocking startup) with a /readyz probe + index_ready in /status. Balance/status stay responsive while the index warms up. sigil-top TUI surfaces an 'explorer: indexing…' badge while the node warms its search. Builds on the v0.40 O(n) search-index fix.
